\tzpentry{ID5922}{Magnetic Flux Wave Equation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID5922 introduces Magnetic Flux Wave Equation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} \frac{\partial^2 \Phi}{\partial t^2} = c^2 \nabla^2_\kappa \Phi + \gamma |\Phi|^2 \Phi \end{equation}
